series_metadata.series_description: : Series contains Notice of Opportunity for Hearing, Consent Agreements, Board Orders, Correspondence, Case Exhibits (e.g. inspection reports, pictures, witness statements, and evidentiary documents), 119 Hearing transcripts relating to violations, Hearing Officer Reports & Recommendations, and appellate documents relating to individual cases.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned machine readable format. ; Electronic: administrative procedure under Chapter 119 of Ohio Revised Code is complete, including exhaustion of all appeals
